name: Lakera
description: Lakera — Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool for developers. Specializes in LLM Security.

seo.title: Lakera Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Lakera analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec.

review.verdict: Lakera is a Security Scanning / Mobile App Sec tool.
pros: Integrates into CI/CD for developer-friendly security checks
cons: False positives require ongoing developer triage time
review.best_for: Dev teams needing SAST, DAST, or SCA in the pipeline
review.not_for: Projects with no regulatory or security compliance needs

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.

developer_experience.reason: Good API docs for LLM sec
